Footer.brandDescription: Aesthetic medicine of the next generation — beauty, skin health, and natural harmony.

Home.metaDescription: Mone Beauty Clinic — a licensed aesthetic-medicine clinic in Helsinki offering a comprehensive, evidence-based approach to the beauty and health of face, body, and hair.

hero.lead: A comprehensive approach to beauty, skin health, and restoring the natural harmony of the face, body, and hair.

treatments.heading: Targeted protocols for face, body & hair

cards.title: Facial Treatments
cards.description: Deep cleansing, hydration & rejuvenation protocols for radiant skin.

cards.title: Injectable Medicine
cards.description: Botulinum therapy, fillers & biorevitalization by medical experts.

cards.title: Device Treatments
cards.description: Laser, RF & apparatus cosmetology with proven technologies.

cards.title: Body Treatments
cards.description: Endospheres, contouring & lymphatic care for the whole body.

about.paragraph1: Mone Beauty Clinic combines aesthetic medicine, advanced technologies, and a comprehensive approach to beauty, skin health, facial rejuvenation, body care, and hair restoration.
about.paragraph2: We are a licensed medical clinic — not a beauty salon — offering safe, evidence-based procedures and personalized treatment plans tailored to each client.

cta.heading: Individual approach to your beauty and health
cta.body: Book your consultation and receive personalized recommendations from our specialists — natural, long-lasting results designed around you.

features.title: Premium Care
features.description: Premium service and a personalized approach.
